title: Juvederm en lippen | Juvéderm® Netherlands
metaDescription: Beautiful lips come in all shapes and sizes, from extra full to more delicately contoured and everything in between. Whatever your desired look, products within the JUVÉDERM® range can be used to help enhance your lips by adding definition and volume without losing distinctive features.
